message:
feat(lab): add actor-specific oracles for leak and supervision testing

New oracles added to OracleSuite:
- ActorLeakOracle: Detects actor reference leaks by tracking spawn/stop
  balance and verifying all actors are properly terminated at test end
- SupervisionOracle: Validates supervision tree invariants including
  parent-child relationships, restart policies, and cascade behavior
- MailboxOracle: Monitors mailbox usage patterns, detecting unbounded
  growth, dropped messages, and stale message handling

OracleViolation enum extended with corresponding variants:
- ActorLeak(actor_id, description): Reports leaked actor instances
- Supervision(tree_path, violation_type): Reports supervision failures
- Mailbox(actor_id, issue): Reports mailbox-related problems

Runtime integration:
- Register new oracles in default OracleSuite construction
- Hook into actor lifecycle events for leak detection
- Mutation engine updated to generate actor-specific fault scenarios

These oracles enable property-based testing of actor systems with
automatic detection of common actor-model bugs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
